title: CoCoReviewBench: A Completeness- and Correctness-Oriented Benchmark for AI Reviewers
referenceKeys: coverage may be uneven some opinions covered others only weakly covered
few or no gold opinions remain not covered

ideas flow logically wording is efficient and the main point and any request is immediately understandable
minor verbosity or small structural issues may exist but they do not hinder comprehension
only a small number of less central gold opinions are missing or weakly covered

references.raw: **5: Fully Verifiable** The claim is thoroughly supported by explicit, sufficient, and robust evidence, such as: Clear reasoning and precise explanations. Specific references to external works. Logical and unassailable c
references.title: Specific references to external works

references.key: coverage may be uneven some opinions covered others only weakly covered
references.raw: **3: Moderate Completeness** **Definition:** The candidate covers some gold opinions, but misses important ones. Coverage may be uneven: some opinions covered, others only weakly covered.
references.title: Coverage may be uneven: some opinions covered, others only weakly covered

references.key: only a small number of less central gold opinions are missing or weakly covered
references.raw: **4: High Completeness** **Definition:** The candidate covers most key gold opinions, with generally adequate substance. Only a small number of less-central gold opinions are missing or weakly covered.
references.title: Only a small number of less-central gold opinions are missing or weakly covered

references.key: few or no gold opinions remain not covered
references.raw: **5: Fully Complete** **Definition:** The candidate covers nearly all key gold opinions, and coverage is meaningful (not merely topical). Few or no gold opinions remain not covered. 55 CoCoReviewBench: A Completenessand
references.title: Few or no gold opinions remain not covered

references.key: minor verbosity or small structural issues may exist but they do not hinder comprehension
references.raw: **4: Clear** **Definition:** The comment is coherent and easy to read, with a mostly well-structured presentation. Minor verbosity or small structural issues may exist, but they do not hinder comprehension.
references.title: Minor verbosity or small structural issues may exist, but they do not hinder comprehension

references.key: ideas flow logically wording is efficient and the main point and any request is immediately understandable
references.raw: **5: Very Clear / Concise** **Definition:** The comment is concise, well-structured, and highly readable. Ideas flow logically, wording is efficient, and the main point (and any request) is immediately understandable. ##
references.title: Ideas flow logically, wording is efficient, and the main point (and any request) is immediately understandable

references.key: think of the things where a response from the author can change your opinion clarify a confusion or address a limitation
references.raw: Questions: Please list up and carefully describe any questions and suggestions for the authors. Think of the things where a response from the author can change your opinion, clarify a confusion or address a limitation. T
references.title: Think of the things where a response from the author can change your opinion, clarify a confusion or address a limitation

references.key: for guidance on when this is appropriate please review the neurips ethics guidelines
references.raw: Ethical concerns: If there are ethical issues with this paper, please flag the paper for an ethics review. For guidance on when this is appropriate, please review the NeurIPS ethics guidelines.
references.title: For guidance on when this is appropriate, please review the NeurIPS ethics guidelines
